name: CONTROL_PLANE_REPOSITORY
notes: Sibling control-plane repo slug used for runtime_common_released dispatch.

name: JOBS_REPOSITORY
notes: Sibling jobs repo slug used for runtime_common_released dispatch.

name: DISPATCH_APP_ID
notes: GitHub App id used for release automation and cross-repo dispatch.

name: DISPATCH_APP_PRIVATE_KEY
notes: GitHub App private key read from a PEM file and stored with literal newline escapes for release automation and cross-repo dispatch.

name: PYTHON_PUBLISH_USERNAME
notes: Username or token sentinel for the Python registry.

name: PYTHON_PUBLISH_PASSWORD
notes: Password or token for the Python registry.
